programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Secret to More Energy, Better Focus & Restful Sleep
programme.desc: MyMagnesiumTM ProClinical delivers 350 mg of highly absorbable magnesium plus clinically studied Shoden® Ashwagandha, vitamin D, Zinc, Boron, and antioxidant-rich organic blueberries—designed to support calm focus, steady energy, and deeper sleep.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Operation Smile
programme.desc: Transforming lives and bringing smiles to children around the world.

programme.title: Gospel of Christ
programme.desc: The Gospel of Christ with Ben Bailey - Taking the Whole Gospel to the Whole World.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution

programme.title: Secret to More Energy, Better Focus & Restful Sleep

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Operation Smile
programme.desc: Transforming lives and bringing smiles to children around the world.

programme.title: 25 Words or Less
programme.desc: Gabrielle Ruiz ("Crazy Ex-Girlfriend") messes up a "Friends"-inspired clue -- but she hopes to pivot and save her game.

programme.title: 25 Words or Less
programme.desc: Rex Lee taps into his Canadian trivia knowledge to help his team get one step closer to the sweet final round.

programme.title: Beat the Bridge
programme.desc: An interactive bridge dares players to cross by stepping on the right answers to challenging trivia questions; each step forward puts money in the team's bank, with bonus money for each successful crossing.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Switch
programme.desc: Jeff Hephner challenges contestants who are ranked based on their answers to trivia questions for a chance at $10,000; every question counts, as each answer can propel them to the top or to the bottom, where they'll be in jeopardy of elimination.

programme.title: Split Second
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins presents three contestants with a question and three possible choices and whoever buzzes in fastest earns the right to answer first.

programme.title: Tic Tac Dough
programme.desc: Two contestants compete to place three marks in a row on trivia board avoiding a dragon that can steal turns; the winner faces the dragon in a final round where it blocks three-in-a-row attempts to prevent the $10,000 prize win.

programme.title: Bingo Blitz
programme.desc: Contestants compete in a dynamic blend of trivia and bingo.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: Two teams of friends and family race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Celebrity Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Brendan Hunt, Melissa Villaseñor and Joe Buck.

programme.title: Celebrity Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Celebrity contestants Rachel Dratch, Mo Rocca and Heather McMahan.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Bill, a retired firefighter who served on 9/11, and his daughter Meghan, a pediatric nurse, take on the wall.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Family Feud Favorites
programme.desc: "Family Feud" has seen some crazy moments over the years, so buckle up as we revisit these fan favorites.

programme.desc: Plexaderm helps reduce Under Eye Bags, Dark Circles, and Wrinkles in just 10 minutes!

programme.title: Mercy Ships
programme.desc: Mercy Ship's crew of world-class medical volunteers sail across the globe providing lifesaving surgeries to those with nowhere else to turn.

programme.title: CSN Mint: 2026 U.S. Silver Proof Set PF70
programme.desc: Celebrate America's 250th with the 2026 U.S. Mint Silver Proof Set, certified perfect NGC PF70 with the official America 250 logo. Includes 10 proof coins, one-year-only designs, fine silver issues and CSN exclusive numbering.

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Mikki Padilla.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Two longtime friends, a group of friends and special guests, "the Property Brothers," ride in the taxi.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: Celebrity battles include Bellamy Young vs. Weird Al Yankovic and Tony Hale vs. Justin Long.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Brooke Burns and Mark "The Beast" Labbett reunite in a showdown.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Players Chante, Will, Shannon and Frank.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Sibs Cheryl and Rose take on co-workers John and Cole.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Chaser James "The High Roller" Holzhauer battles against a murder mystery enthusiast, a veterinary pathologist, and a Michigan local whose irrational fear includes floating heads.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Church co-pastors and brothers Matt, a firefighter, and Nick, a high school teacher and football coach, take on the wall; with the all-new Superdrop and millions of dollars just a drop away, there is no stopping where these Texas boys will go.

programme.title: Hockey
programme.desc: Gold Medal.

programme.desc: From the Canadian Tire Centre in Kanata, Ontario.

programme.desc: Gold Medal game. From Jan. 5, 2021.

programme.desc: The best moments from the World Junior Championships.

programme.title: 2025 IIHF World Junior Championship

programme.title: The Whalers
programme.desc: Almost three decades after leaving Connecticut, the Hartford Whalers remain a fixture in the sports world. This is the story of how the team came to be, why they moved and what makes them a throwback phenomenon.

programme.title: Relive the Magic
programme.desc: A look back at the 1998-99 Dallas Stars championship season.

programme.title: One Winona: The Making of a Hockey Town
programme.desc: In the southeastern corner of the State of Hockey, sits a small town with big hockey dreams. Winona, Minn. is one of eleven cities selected to receive the inaugural Minnesota Wild Foundation's Skate It Forward grants, created in 2025.

programme.title: Pioneers
programme.desc: Red Kelly discusses his playing days with the Red Wings and Maple Leafs as well as winning eight Stanley Cups.

programme.title: Pioneers
programme.desc: New York Rangers legend Harry Howell talks about his playing days in the NHL.

programme.title: Stanley Cup Films
programme.desc: A look at the 1956 Stanley Cup Finals.

programme.title: Stanley Cup Films
programme.desc: A look at the 1957 Stanley Cup Finals.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Auston Matthews TOR Goals Leader/Schaefer Goals: From Jan. 3, 2026. From UBS Arena.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Leon Draisaitl 1,000th PT. From Dec. 16, 2025. From PPG Paints Arena.

programme.title: Hawkeytown: Portland to the Pros
programme.desc: The story of players achieving their dream of playing in the NHL.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Lightning host the Canadiens for a decisive Game 7 of the Eastern Conference First Round. Both teams recorded 106 points in the regular season. Tampa Bay forced this Game 7 with an overtime victory to avoid elimination in Game 6.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Stars take on the Wild for Game 6 of the Western Conference first round at Grand Casino Arena. Minnesota leads the best-of-seven series 3-2. Rookie Jesper Wallstedt made 20 saves. Kirill Kaprizov sealed the win with two minutes left.

programme.title: Vintage Games
programme.desc: Mike Modano gets his 1,233rd point. From Nov. 7, 2007.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Alex Ovechkin's 900th Goal. From Nov. 5, 2025. From Capital One Arena.

programme.title: Vintage Games
programme.desc: From March 23, 1994, when Gretzky breaks the goal scoring record.

programme.title: The Whalers
programme.desc: Almost three decades after leaving Connecticut, the Hartford Whalers remain a fixture in the sports world. This is the story of how the team came to be, why they moved and what makes them a throwback phenomenon.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Game 1 of the Eastern Conference First Round between the Ottawa Senators and the Carolina Hurricanes takes place at Lenovo Center. This marks the first playoff meeting between these two franchises. Carolina won the regular-season series 2-1.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Hurricanes host the Senators in Game 2 of their Eastern Conference first-round series. Carolina looks to build on its 1-0 series lead after Taylor Hall and Logan Stankoven provided the offense in a 2-0 Game 1 win at Lenovo Center.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Hurricanes meet the Senators for Game 3 of the East first round at Canadian Tire Centre. Carolina leads 2-0 after a 3-2 double-OT win. Ottawa erased a 2-0 deficit to force OT, but Jordan Martinook won it at 13:53 of the second overtime.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Hurricanes face the Senators in Game 4 of the East first round at Canadian Tire Centre. Carolina leads 3-0 after a Game 3 win. Logan Stankoven opened the scoring for the third straight game. Frederik Andersen made 21 saves in the 2-1 victory.

programme.title: Live: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: A Fishing Story
programme.desc: Tiffany Greene is a sports commentator who carries forward the legacy of her remarkable parents, whose accomplishments and guidance paved the way for her own success.

programme.title: New England Traveler
programme.desc: Greg battles the blazing summer heat on a Witch City Walking Tour through historic Salem, Mass.; along the way, he cools off with fresh seafood at Finz and Sea Level on Pickering Wharf; then turns up the magic with a cosplay experience at Witch Pix.

programme.title: Travel Moore With Anthony Moore
programme.desc: Anthony heads to SkyVenture in Nashua, N.H., for a triple threat of adrenaline; watch as he catches air in the vertical wind tunnel and takes a tumble in the FishPipe, the world's first rotating barrel water slide.

programme.title: Hear Better With Audien
programme.desc: Audien Hearing is a leader in over-the-counter hearing aids, committed to making high-quality hearing accessible to all. Discover how advanced, affordable solutions are helping more people experience better hearing every day.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Angela, Charlie and the entire family get together for the 2025 It's a Charlie Moore Christmas; Tony the Elf gets some bad news; The Codfather gives gift-giving advice; Angela and Charlie make Italian butter cookies.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Angela and Charlie celebrate their annual Christmas bash; Angela makes Buffalo chicken dip and Charlie whips up his cucumber-salmon appetizer; Maverick and Kingston make their television debut.

programme.title: Travel Moore With Anthony Moore
programme.desc: Anthony heads to Tewksbury, Mass., for a visit to Wamesit Lanes Family Entertainment Center. Owner Donny MacLaren gives Anthony a VIP tour and takes part in dart throwing, shuffleboard, bowling, arcades and some great burgers.

programme.title: Travel Moore With Anthony Moore
programme.desc: Anthony heads out in search of some of the best burgers New England has to offer. He visits the seacoast NH area and visits Hop and Grind and also Gibbs Garage Bar and Grille then scoots to Salem, Mass., to critique Boston Burger and Bit Bar.

programme.title: Cruisin' New England
programme.desc: Paul Mennett looks back at some of his favorite segments including a visit with a legendary race car instructor.

programme.title: Outside the Fame
programme.desc: An in-depth look into the lives of current and former New England athletes that Boston fans may not otherwise have a chance to see.

programme.title: Golf Destination
programme.desc: An in-depth look at some of the world's greatest golf courses.

programme.title: Dining Playbook With Billy and Jenny
programme.desc: We're heading up to Gloucester and checking into The Inn at Good Harbor Beach. We're also getting a taste of one of the world's most sought-after delicacies at Marky's Caviar and heading to Scrappies Pizza in Southie.

programme.title: Meet Boston With Billy & Jenny
programme.desc: Exploring Boston Common and celebrating Boston's Greenprint from the city's best parks, waterfronts, and outdoor experiences. Our Hubsters are sharing their unique perspectives and adventures along the way.

programme.title: Wicked Bites
programme.desc: We're heading to the stunning Lake Region! Join us as we explore the area's fantastic dining scene, where every meal comes with a spectacular view. From lakeside seafood to mountaintop bistros, we're showcasing the can't-miss culinary destinations.

programme.title: New England Traveler
programme.desc: Greg visits Wamesit Lanes in Tewksbury, Mass., to explore this amazing entertainment complex. He learns about the history of Candlepin bowling from expert and author Mike Morin, bowls with celebrity Boston comedian Dave Russo and much more.

programme.desc: The best parties, hottest venues, and coolest destinations in New England nightlife.

programme.title: Wingshooting USA
programme.desc: Described as a cross between "Dog Whisperer" and "A River Runs Through It" -- with shotguns, hunting adventures and incredible scenery thrown in -- "Wingshooting USA" depicts the fun and excitement of upland bird hunting and honors the dogs that make it all possible.
